    What Is Adventure
    What is adventure travel?

    Adventure Travel is for those inclined or willing to engage in adventures; defined as exciting or very unusual experiences. To be adventurous. Adventure Travel is participatory. It's the act of engaging in the activities of a travel experience rather than viewing it as a spectator. The true definition of Adventure Travel can be found between the beholder's eyes, mind, and heart. We know the way! 

    Your Vision, Our Expertise!

    You might have a greyscale vision of where you want to go and a few ideas of what you'd like to see and do once you get there. Or perhaps you have a blurred image of a globe teeming with travel possibilities but seek a refined adventure in a place totally new to you.

    ?

    Like stepping into OZ, the Walking Connection elevates a monochrome aspiration into a panorama of colors and refines your hazy visions into a high-definition travel adventure that will live in your memory forever. With us, every detail is meticulously curated, and every path is known. ~We know the way! 

    Scroll Down

    Walking Connection

    ADVENTURES, TOURS & TRAVEL

    Experience The World, One Step At A Time.

    Exclusive Guided Small Group Travel, Overseas Adventure Travel, Family Adventures, Self-Guided, Independent Journeys
    & Private Walking Tours.     >>>
    2025 & 2026 Adventures
    Privately hosted and locally guided small group tours of 6-10 people are the hallmark of the Walking Connection's outdoor adventure travel and walking tour program. Our unique adventure itineraries embrace walking simply because it is the best way to meet people and experience places. 

    From African safaris to overseas adventure tours of Spain's Camino de Santiago, to a European hiking vacation in Ireland or a trail in Kenya's Mathew Mountains, we empower you with the knowledge and services to journey securely and experience genuine freedom.

    Our commitment goes beyond mere travel—it's about fostering a sense of liberation from exploring the world on your terms. Join us and discover the art of safe, unbridled exploration. We Know The Way!

    Scroll Down

    It's Time For A
    Meaningful Travel
    Adventure.

    This is a great place to add a tagline.

    Choose a scripted and professionally guided itinerary, or explore at a relaxed pace with the independence of a self-guided adventure. Even better, do a combination of both. We have carefully cultivated itineraries in Spain or Portugal where you are welcomed as an old friend rather than a tourist just passing through.
     
    If your heart is set on a solo adventure or traveling with a small group of friends or family, join us on a private yacht in the Galapagos Islands or a life-changing cultural and wildlife experience on the African Continent.  
     
    Your successful journey begins with Walking Connection Adventure Travel, where you are treated as a lifelong guest from the moment we meet. Since 1989, our success has been measured by Our 96% guest repeat rate.

    Call or email us to learn more about what it is like to travel with us.

    Where Do You Want To Go in 24 & 25?

    Footsteps of Man

    Maasai Land - Ngorongoro Conservation Area, Tanzania

    Signature Adventure by Jo Ann Taylor

    It was an amazing hiking adventure through Maasai land. Never have I felt so in touch with humankind. I walked in the footsteps of hominids. I walked with caring, helpful Maasai guides who shared their generational knowledge of the land and its people. I walked among flocks of flamingos and herds of sheep and cattle. I walked from camp to camp, through villages, and among the people. Over six days, it etched its imprint on my soles and soul. It will do the same for you. 

    Walking in the Footsteps of Man. My Great Rift Valley Trek in Maasai Land.

    Story & Images by Gene Taylor - On GenesJourney
